/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: DAVID HARRISON/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:02-22-21 (30TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS03-08-21/987,2/BAIL:50,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA2: 225 HOFFMAN AVE, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:01-15-21 FOR ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/CONTD: 01-07-21 IN DEPT, 20 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
